description: Display name when the answering agent has no ERPNext user

description: AI post-call analysis from Triton. All fields are written by the call-intelligence webhook and are read-only here.

description: The Phone Communication holding the full transcript and recording attachment
label: Transcript Communication
name: Call Log-custom_communication

description: AI-estimated customer satisfaction (1-5)
label: CSAT Score

description: Thread root for threaded replies in the custom Comments App (erpnext_enhancements). Always points at a top-level comment; set by api.comments.add_comment.

options:
Lead
Prospect
Client
Champion
Vendor
Competitor
Advocate

description: Google Drive folder for this customer in the Shared Drive. Set automatically on Customer creation when "Create Customer Folders" is enabled in Project Folder Google Drive Settings; project provisioning nests project folders inside it.
label: Drive Folder ID
name: Customer-custom_drive_folder_id

description: Automatically updated based on the last activity on this account.
label: Last Activity Date
name: Customer-custom_last_activity_date

description: Select the user who will receive inactivity reminders and ToDos for this account. If left blank, the document owner will be assigned.
label: Reminder Assignee
name: Customer-custom_reminder_assignee

description: Set the number of days of inactivity before a reminder is triggered. Set to 0 to disable.
label: Reminder Days
name: Customer-custom_reminder_days

description: This technician's service truck/van warehouse. Maintenance-visit chemicals default to it when the water feature has no on-site store.

name: Employee-custom_default_vehicle_warehouse

description: Google Drive file id this attachment is mirrored to (set by the attachment sync) or sourced from (link-only shadow attachments). Prevents echo loops between the two systems.

name: File-custom_drive_file_id
